title: Martika
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Martika''''' was a cargo [[Starship/Legends|starship]] which ran shipping jobs from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. When [[Brock Lar]] came to the planet, he managed to become the first mate of this ship.

==Behind the scenes==
''Martika'' was created by [[Matthew Berry]] and [[Craig Farr]], two ''[[Star Wars]]'' fans, for the backstory of their [[Brock Lar]] entry in the [[Design An Alien]] contest held in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]s''.
